item.value: The retract area specified in usRetractArea is not supported.
The output position is not empty so a cash in is not possible.
There is no Cash-In transaction active.
Items were present at the output position at the start of the operation, but were removed before the operation was complete
The CIM is in the exchange state.
There was no banknote to create a signature.
The position specified is not supported.
There were too many items inserted for cash in. The Cash-In stacker is full.
A problem occurred with a Cash Unit.
The specified field cannot be found.
A failure has occurred during Emboss processing.
An error occurred while processing a field, causing termination of the emboss request.
The syntax of the lpszFields member is invalid.
The ATR was not obtained by issuing the IDC class WFS_CMD_CEU_READ_RAW_DATA command.
The protocol used was not supported by the service provider.
An error occurred while communicating with the chip.
The specified IDC form definition is invalid.
The specified IDC form definition cannot be found.
There is no card inside the device.
The specified media definition is invalid.
The specified media definition cannot be found.
The specified form cannot be found.
Character set(s) supported by service provider is inconsistent with use of lpszCamData or lpszUNICODECamData fields.
The specified camera is not supported.
A hardware error occurred while executing the command.
The command was invoked with incorrect input data.
An attempt to enable or disable events to a port was invalid because the port does not exist.
There are no active keys specified.
At least one of the specified keys is not supported by the service provider.
At least one of the specified keys is invalid.
Character set(s) supported by service provider is inconsistent with use of lpszFields or lpszUNICODEFields fields.
The specified resolution is not supported by the display.
The read operation was terminated by pressing the <CANCEL>-key.
An attempt to set a LED to a new value was invalid because the LED does not exist.
The specified form definition cannot be found.
The specified form definition is invalid.
The syntax of the lpszFields member is invalid.
The specified field cannot be found.
An error occurred while processing a field, causing termination of the display request
Toner or ink supply is empty or printing contrast with ribbon is not sufficient.
Character set(s) supported by service provider is inconsistent with use of lpszPrintData or lpszUNICODEPrintData fields.
The result of the deposit is not known.
The deposit container is not present.
The envelope entered has an incorrect size.
An envelope jam occurred in the dispenser transport between the envelope supply and the output slot.
There is no envelope in the envelope unit.
An envelope jam occurred in the deposit transport between the entry slot and the deposit container.
The device is unable to open and/or close it’s shutter.
The media is jammed. Operator intervention is required.
Character set(s) supported by service provider is inconsistent with use of lpszOutputField or lpszUNICODEOutputField.
The syntax of the lpszInputFields or lpszOutputFields member is invalid.
A required field is missing on the check.
An error occurred while processing a field,causing termination of the read request.
The specified field cannot be found.
The specified media definition is invalid.
The specified media definition cannot be found.
The specified form cannot be found.
The PIN device does not have a private key.
The SCD serial number in the input data is invalid
The signature in the input data is invalid.
The encrypted random number in the input data does not decrypt to the one previously provided by the EPP
The verification of the imported key failed and the key was discarded.
The EPP is unable to generate a key pair
The certificate module is in a state in which the request is invalid.
The modulus length specified is invalid.
The SP does not support the Signature Algorithm requested.
The contents of one of the security relevant fields are invalid.
The format of the message is invalid.
The MAC of the message is not correct.
The HSM is not in a correct state to handle this command.
The specified format is not supported.
The specified algorithm is not supported.
A chipcard key is used as encryption key and there is no chip transaction active.
There is no space left in the key RAM for a key of the specified type.
PIN entered by the user is not allowed.
An error occurred while communicating with the chip.
The specified protocol is not supported by the service provider.
The minimum PIN length field is invalid or greater than the maximum PIN length field.
There are no terminate keys specified and bAutoEnd is FALSE.
There are no active function keys specified.
At least one of the specified function keys or FDKs is not supported by the service provider.
At least one of the specified function keys or FDKs is invalid.
The length of lpxKeyEncKey is not supported.
PIN has not been entered or has been cleared.
The specified use is not supported by this key.
The specified key encryption key is not loaded.
A key exists with that name and cannot be overwritten.
The ID passed was not valid.
The encryption module is either not initialized or not ready for any vendor specific reason.
The specified mode is not supported.
The specified key name is not found.
Items have been left in the transport or exit slot as a result of a prior Dispense, Present or Recycler Cash-In operation.
Items have not been taken during a subdispense operation. This error occurs if a hardware timeout expires.
A mix table is being used to determine the denomination but the amount specified for the denomination is not in the mix table.
Cash box amount needed, however teller is not assigned a Cash Box.
The retract area specified in usRetractArea is not supported.
The output position is not empty so a cash in is not possible.
The contents of at least one of the defined rows of the mix table is incorrect.
Items were present at the output position at the start of the operation, but were removed before the operation was complete
There was an error during the present operation -the position of the items is unknown.
There was an error during the present operation -at least some of the items were presented.
There was an error during the present operation -no items were presented.
The CDM service is in an exchange state.
There are no items on the stacker.
The shutter is open when it should be closed.No items presented.
The shutter is not open or did not open when it should have. No items presented.
The specified output position is not supported.
The request requires too many items to be dispensed.
The amount is not dispensable by the CDM.
The cash units specified in the denomination were not all of the same currency.
The usMixNumber is WFS_CDM_INDIVIDUAL and the sum of the values for cashbox and denomination was greater than the amount specified.
There is a problem with a cash unit.
The card that was inserted is too long. When this error occurs the card remains at the exit slot.
The card that was inserted is too short. When this error occurs the card remains at the exit slot.
The specified action is not supported by the hardware device.
The fwWriteMethod value is inconsistent with device capabilities.
The key does not fit to the security module.
The ATR was not obtained before by issuing a Read Command.
The protocol used was not supported by the service provider.
The security module failed reading the cards security sign.
The open of the shutter failed due to manipulation or hardware error. Operator intervention is required.
The syntax of the data pointed to by lpstrTrackData is in error, or does not conform to the form definition.
The specified form definition is invalid.
The specified form can not be found.
No chip found; card may have been inserted the wrong way.
An error occurred while communicating with the chip.
The retain bin is full; no more cards can be retained.The current card is still in the device.
The card has been retained during attempts to eject it.The device is clear and can be used.
The card was removed before completion of the read action.
The card is jammed. Operator intervention is required.
The media entered has an incorrect size.
Toner or ink supply is empty or printing contrast with ribbon is not sufficient.
No stamping possible, stamping ink supply empty.
Character set(s) supported by service provider is inconsistent with use of lpszFields or lpszUNICODEFields fields.
Directory does not exist or File io error while storing the image to the hard disk.
The media is jammed. Operator intervention is required.
Open or close of the shutter failed due to manipulation or hardware error.
The device was not able to turn the inserted media.
The device was not able to turn the page.
The internal stacker is full. No more media can be moved to the stacker.
The retract bin is full. No more media can be retracted. The current media is still in the device.
The media skew exceeded the limit in the form definition.
The specified media definition is invalid.
The specified media definition cannot be found.
An Error_tmp occurred while processing a field, causing termination of the print request.
The syntax of the lpszFields member is invalid.
The device was not able to flush data.
The device has no read capability.
No media is present in the device.
The specified field cannot be found.
The specified form cannot be found.

The data structure passed as an input parameter although valid for this service class, is not supported by this
service provider or device.
A user is preventing proper operation of the device.
The connection to the service is lost.
The function required access to configuration information, and an error occurred on the software.
The data structure passed as input parameter contains invalid data..
Within the service, a version mismatch of two modules occurred.
The dwCommand issued, although valid for this service class, is not supported by this service provider or device.
The dwCategory issued, although valid for this service class, is not supported by this service provider.

The range of versions of the service-specific interface support requested by the application is lower than any
supported by the service provider for the logical service being opened.

The range of versions of the service-specific interface support requested by the application is higher than any
supported by the service provider for the logical service being opened.

The range of versions of XFS SPI support requested by the XFS Manager is lower than any supported by the
service provider for the logical service being opened.

The range of versions of XFS SPI support requested by the XFS Manager is higher than any supported by the
service provider for the logical service being opened.
The logical name is not a valid service provider name.
There is not enough memory available to satisfy the request.

A blocking operation is in progress on the thread; only WFSCancelBlockingCall and WFSIsBlocking are
permitted at this time.
The specified hWndReg window was not registered to receive messages for any event classes.
The application has not previously performed a successful WFSStartUp.
The XFS Manager may not unload the service provider DLL.
The application requesting a service be unlocked had not previously performed a successful WFSLock or.
The timer could not be created.
The specified thread does not exist.
The file containing the service provider does not exist.
There is no outstanding blocking call for the specified thread.
The service is locked under a different hService.
The dwTraceLevel parameter does not correspond to a valid trace level or set of levels.
The hWnd and usTimerID parameters do not correspond to a currently active timer.
The file containing the service provider is invalid or corrupted.
The lpResult parameter is not a pointer to an allocated WFSRESULT structure.
The RequestID parameter does not correspond to an outstanding request on the service.
A pointer parameter does not point to accessible memory.
The hWndReg parameter is not a valid window handle.
The hWnd parameter is not a valid window handle.
The hProvider parameter is not a valid provider handle.
The hService parameter is not a valid service handle.
The dwEventClass parameter specifies one or more event classes not supported by the service.
The dwCommand issued is not supported by this service class.
The dwCategory issued is not supported by this service class.
The lpvData parameter is not a pointer to an allocated buffer structure.
The specified application handle is not valid, i.e., was not created by a preceding create call.
The lpvOriginal parameter does not point to a previously allocated buffer.
An internal inconsistency or other unexpected error occurred in the XFS subsystem.
The function required device access, and an error occurred on the device.
The function required device access, and the device was not ready or timed out.
The length of the value to be returned exceeds the length of the buffer.
There are no more subkeys to be returned (the iSubKey parameter is greater than the index of the last subkey).
The length of the name to be returned exceeds the length of the buffer.
The specified key has subkeys and cannot be deleted. The subkeys must be deleted first.
The specified value does not exist within the specified open key.
The key specified by lpszSubKey does not exist.
The value specified by the lpszValueName parameter does not exist in the specified key.
The specified hKey parameter does not correspond to a currently open key.
The request was canceled by WFSCancelAsyncRequest or WFSCancelBlockingCall.

The range of versions of XFS API support requested by the application is lower than any supported by this
particular XFS Manager implementation.
The range of versions of XFS API support requested by the application is higher than any supported by this particular XFS Manager implementation.
A WFSStartUp has already been issued by the application, without an intervening WFSCleanUp.
Windows OS Fatal Error And Pop Dialog
Excetion Of Windows OS In ATMC
Exception occurred while handling other processes
Data packet lost while performing PING command
Network communication failure, the transmitting indicator SD is off
NNetwork communication failure, the receiving indicator RD is off ,the carrier indicator CD is not blinking
Network communication failure, indicators are OK, TCP/IP protocol is not working properly
The system is in network communication failure state, executing PING command normally
SDLC communication protocol status code CB?
File operation error, failure to open the screen file
Attempt to input error password too many times
Track and password error, track number called by software error
Logic configuring notes error, note cassette failure or note cassette empty, or database error
Logic configuring notes error, withdrawal amount inputted exceeds maximum amount of dispensing notes at one time
Logic configuring notes error, project 1 for configuring notes failed, improper withdrawal amount inputted
Logic configuring notes error, project 2 for configuring notes failed, improper withdrawal amount inputted
Logic configuring notes error, withdrawal amount inputted exceeds maximum amount of dispensing notes at one time
Logic configuring notes error, withdrawal amount calculated by the system in last checking exceeds maximum amount of dispensing notes at one time
Logic configuring notes error, last checking failed, calculated notes amount not matches
Logic configuring notes error, note cassette denomination error
Note cassette initialization error, failure to get note cassette status
Note cassette initialization error, failure to get note cassette status when there is no hardware simulation
Note cassette initialization error, failure to get the data in database, database error
Security config file is not exist (GrgSecurity.cfg)
Verify failed because of damaged integrity
Verify failed because of damaged lisence
Advertisement package response, failure to unpack advertisement package: there is no more than two separators 0x1C
Advertisement package response, failure to unpack advertisement package: the length is incorrect
Advertisement package response, failure to download files
Advertisement package response, failure to revise the configuration table
Advertisement package response, unknown response code
Serial port, failure to open port
Serial port, the serial board returns false data
Serial port, the port of the serial port not initialized
Serial port, failure to send command to the serial board
Serial port, failure to set the parameters of the serial board
RS232 hub, command for getting door status format error
RS232 hub, failure to get door status
RS232 hub, door operation communication timeout
RS232 hub, other errors about indicators
RS232 hub, command for getting indicators status format error
RS232 hub, command for setting indicators format error
RS232 hub, failure to get indicators status
RS232 hub, indicators operation communication timeout
RS232 hub, failure to get infrared sensor status
RS232 hub, sensors operation communication timeout
Dispenser, notes have been rejected during the note dispensing transaction
Dispenser, notes have been rejected during the note dispensing transaction
Dispenser, illegal command or command sequence
Dispenser, cassette not present or opened
Dispenser, failure to feed or too many notes rejected in the transaction
Dispenser, reject vault not present or opened
Dispenser, notes in bundle output unit
Dispenser, note feeder sensors need service
Dispenser, configuration file error, dispenser management module not found
Dispenser, dispenser management module authentication error
Dispenser, dispenser management module initialization error
Dispenser, serial port component initialization error
Dispenser, command or command parameters error
Card reader, card is at dispense port
Card reader, card is inside the card reader, at reading position
Card reader, card is at the reading start position of the sensor
Card reader, IC card is pressed
Card reader, IC card is actived
Card reader, Commond is sent to IC card
Card reader, waiting to receive command from IC card
Card reader, waiting to send command to IC card
Card reader, force to interrupt command receive and send state
Card reader, download completed, card reader is waiting for initialization
Card reader, no card in the card reader but shutter is open, maybe is blocked by something
Card reader, card is inside the card reader, but not at reading position(i.e. card is not at the magnetic read position)
Card reader, card cannot be released by anti-fishing device, please manually release it
Card reader, response data package format error
Card reader, communication error (failure to send data)
Card reader, command format error (command can not be identified)
Card reader, not receiving ACK signal
Card reader, not receiving correct ACK signal（receive NAK or invalid data）
Card reader, initial command waiting after FW loading completion
Card reader, memory card can not be verified
Card reader, memory card verification error
Card reader, card is drawn out after card insertion, to cause card read error
Cardreader is waitting for to be initialize
Card reader, the card is not inserted from the rear
Card reader, executing card move operation before releasing the IC card, command sequence error
Card reader, read error, can not detect correct start sentinel (SS) code
Card reader, read error, can not detect correct end sentinel (ES) code
Card reader, read error, can not detect correct vertical redundancy checking (VRC) code
Card reader, read error, can not detect correct longitudinal redundancy checking (LRC) code
Card reader, read error, can not read any encoding information
Card reader, read error, can not read any data
Card reader, read error, card information incorrect, but this error is not same as above errors (1244~1250)
Card reader, specified track can not be read
Card reader, write error, can not detect correct start sentinel (SS) code
Card reader, write error, can not detect correct end sentinel (ES) code
Card reader, write error, can not detect correct vertical redundancy checking (VRC) code
Card reader, write error, can not detect correct longitudinal redundancy checking (LRC) code
Card reader, write error, can not read any information when verification
Card reader, write error, can not read any data when verification
Card reader, write error, card information incorrect, but this error is not same as above errors (1253~1258)
Card reader, card is forced out when re-intake
Card reader, insertion card timeout, the card is not inserted during the monitoring period
Card reader, take-out card timeout, the card can not be removed during the monitoring period
Card reader, re-intake card timeout, the card can not be taken in again during the monitoring period
Card reader, card is held at takeout position during initial reset
Card reader, undefined command (command inputted can not be identified)
Card reader, receiving from IC card impossibility, over buffer data is received from the IC card
Card reader, IC card short- circuit or faulty
Card reader, IC card communication abnormality
Card reader, IC card forced interruption receiving (for T=1 protocol)
Card reader, unsupported IC card（unsupported by communication protocol）
Card reader, IC card receiving data abnormality, the card reader receives invalid data during T=0 or T=1 protocol executing
Card reader, not receiving ATR after powering to IC card
Card reader, not according with IC card protocol
Card reader, sending IC card communication command before receiving ATR, command sequence error
Card reader, attempting to communicate with unsupported IC card
Card reader, write track setting error
Card reader, card jam during transport
Card reader, card jam in re-intake
Card reader, card jam at the rear
Card reader, waiting for initial reset
Card reader, IC card solenoid abnormality, impossible to press or release the contact
Card reader, IC card movement in press
Card reader, micro switch SW1, SW2 error
Card reader, too many cards captured
Card reader, the card reader operation timeout, not receiving response data
Receipt printer, position of black mark error
Receipt printer, failure to send data to the serial port
Updated FW version is the same as model FW version
Receipt printer, print data length exceeds limit
Receipt printer, collision of print width and margin-left
Receipt printer, alignment mode setting error
Receipt printer, paper-near-end print setting error
Receipt printer, collision of bitmap width and margin-left
Black Mark Error of Receipt Printer
Receipt printer, receipt is thrown away
Receipt printer, fail to insert character
Receipt printer, fail to insert bar code
Receipt printer, quick paper advance error
Receipt printer, failure to get memory when calling print interface
Receipt printer, paper cutting failure at black mark
Receipt printer, black mark position error
Receipt printer, print pulse of the dot matrix printer error
Receipt printer, print data is not clear or complete
Receipt printer, configuration file read error
Receipt printer, immediately paper cutting after print error
Receipt printer, Fail to get serial number
Receipt printer, Fail to get the printer type number
Receipt printer, fail to find firmware file
Receipt printer, Fail to update firmware
Receipt printer, Communication parameter or communication initialization error
Receipt printer, fail to open firmware
Receipt printer, Fail to send data
Receipt printer, The data received is wrong
Journal printer, failure to send data to the serial port
Journal printer, firmware version the same!
Journal printer, Fail to write data to buffer file
Journal printer, Fail to process the data in buffer file
Journal printer, Fail to allocate memory
Journal printer, receiving data verification error
Journal printer, clearing print buffer error
Journal printer, setting word space error
Journal printer, print data length exceeds limit
Journal printer, Data received is wrong
Journal printer, Fail to move the print head
Journal printer, Parameter setup of line interval is invalid
Journal printer, Parameter setup of character interval is invalid
Journal printer, Parameter of feeding or returning paper is invalid
Journal printer, Format of the character string error
Journal printer, Reading configuration file error
Journal printer, Allocating PC memory error
Journal printer, Head in/down level error
Journal printer, Bitmap format is not set
Journal printer, Firmware file is not found件
Journal printer, Fail to open Firmware file
Journal printer, Versions does not match
Journal printer, Fail to update Firmware
Journal printer, Fail to erase FLASH
Journal printer, Sequence number reading/writing error
Journal printer, Sequence number has been set
Journal printer, Communication parameter setup error
Invoice printer, failure to send data to the serial port
Invoice printer, print data length exceeds limit
Invoice printer, black mark position error
Invoice printer, print head too hot
Invoice printer, paper cut position setting error
Invoice printer, paper width setting error
Invoice printer, line pitch setting error
Invoice printer, word space setting error
SAM card module, illegal word is returned from the card supporting T=1 protocol
SAM card module, R word with EDC error is returned from the card supporting T=1 protocol
SAM card module, R word with other errors is returned from the card supporting T=1 protocol
SAM card module, card protocol selecting error, commands in T=0 protocol are used for the SAM card that does not supports T=0 protocol
SAM card module, card protocol selecting error, commands in T=1 protocol are used for the SAM card that does not supports T=1 protocol
SAM card module, word size overflow
SAM card module, can not detect valid hardware encryption card
SAM card module, no ATR information returned from card
SAM card module, card operation failure
SAM card module, card not activated before operation
SAM card module, operation sequence error, card data not received entirely
SAM card module, initializing hardware encryption function failure
SAM card module, unsupported key length
SAM card module, unsupported encryption data length
SAM card module, can not use two hardware encryption cards at one time
SAM card module, can not use general SAM card operation commands for hardware encryption card

SAM card module, file in hardware encryption card invalid
SAM card module, failure to write hardware encryption card
SAM card module, data ready to read length error
SAM card module, hardware encryption card status invalid
SAM card module, file type mismatch in hardware encryption card
SAM card module, safety status does not meet condition
SAM card module, no random number gotten before external authentication
SAM card module, use condition does not meet requirement
SAM card module, data requiring authentication incorrect
SAM card module, data field parameter error in the command of hardware encryption card
SAM card module, unsupported function by hardware encryption card
SAM card module, file in hardware encryption card invalid
SAM card module, record in hardware encryption card invalid
SAM card module, insufficient space in card
SAM card module, P1, P2 parameters incorrect
SAM card module, data in hardware encryption card invalid
SAM card module, card parameter error
SAM card module, incorrect card command
SAM card module, incorrect card command type
SAM card module, specified key inexistence
SAM card module, authentication code error
SAM card module, illegal data is returned from the hardware encryption card
SAM card module, checking code required incorrect

SAM card module, password checking incorrect, and the password may be retried for 2 times

Withdrawal shutter, failure to close the shutter, shutter half-open

Bill acceptor, accepted banknote inserted, normal code
Bill acceptor, unaccepted banknote inserted, normal code
Bill acceptor, NV100 working face dirty
Bill acceptor, ambient light level 1 warn
Bill acceptor, ambient light level 2 warn
Bill acceptor, magnetic interference level 1 warn
Bill acceptor, magnetic interference level 2 warn
Bill acceptor, magnetic interference level 3 warn
Bill acceptor, manipulation suspected since last status request
Bill acceptor, power down since last status request
Bill acceptor, unknown banknote in transport
Bill acceptor, manipulation suspected, all banknotes returned
Bill acceptor, output slot not empty
Bill acceptor, input slot not empty
Bill acceptor, no result from NV100
Bill acceptor, incorrect transport speed during measurement
Bill acceptor, excessive ambient light during measurement
Bill acceptor, excessive magnetic interference during measurement
Bill acceptor, too long banknote during measurement
Bill acceptor, high running during measurement
Bill acceptor, more than one banknote inserted or banknote too dirty during measurement
Bill acceptor, banknote not identified during measurement
Bill acceptor, denomination not selected during measurement
Bill acceptor, genuineness test failed during measurement
Bill acceptor, banknote not at BV
Bill acceptor, banknote not at Stacker
